provider.name: HoverProvider

method.name: provideHover
method.signature: provideHover(model: ITextModel, position: Position, token: CancellationToken): Hover | null | undefined

param.name: model
param.desc: The text model of the current editor

property.name: contents
property.desc: Markdown content to display in tooltip

property.name: range
property.desc: Optional range to highlight when hovering

property.name: value
property.desc: Markdown text — supports code blocks, bold, italic

provider.name: DefinitionProvider

method.name: provideDefinition
method.signature: provideDefinition(model: ITextModel, position: Position, token: CancellationToken): Definition | null | undefined

property.name: originSelectionRange
property.desc: Range of the symbol in source file (highlights on Ctrl+click)

property.name: targetRange
property.desc: Full range of the target e.g. whole function

property.name: targetSelectionRange
property.desc: Exact symbol range in target e.g. just function name

provider.name: CompletionProvider

interfaces.interface:
<property name="triggerCharacters" type="string[]" required="false" desc="Characters that trigger completion e.g. ['.', '/', '@', '\"']" />
provideCompletionItems(model: ITextModel, position: Position, context: CompletionContext, token: CancellationToken): CompletionList | null | undefined
resolveCompletionItem(item: CompletionItem, token: CancellationToken): CompletionItem Optional — lazy load full details only when item is selected in dropdown. Use for expensive doc fetching.

property.name: triggerCharacter
property.desc: The character that triggered if triggerKind=1

property.name: incomplete
property.desc: If true Monaco re-triggers completion on next keystroke

method.name: dispose
method.desc: Called when list is no longer needed

property.name: kind
property.desc: Icon and category — see kind values below

property.name: insertText
property.desc: Text inserted on accept — use $1 $2 for tabstops

property.name: range
property.desc: Where to insert — usually word range at cursor

property.name: detail
property.desc: Short description shown inline right of label

property.name: documentation
property.desc: Full docs shown in detail pane — supports markdown

property.name: sortText
property.desc: Controls sort order — alphabetical by default

property.name: preselect
property.desc: If true this item is pre-selected in dropdown

property.name: additionalTextEdits
property.desc: Additional edits applied on accept e.g. add import

property.name: command
property.desc: Command executed after insertion e.g. trigger signature help

property.name: detail
property.desc: Rendered after label e.g. parameter types

property.name: description
property.desc: Rendered less prominently e.g. source module

kind.name: TypeParameter
kind.use_for: generic type parameters T K V

syntax.desc: Simple tabstops — cursor jumps in order
Final cursor position after all tabstops

provider.name: SignatureHelpProvider
provider.desc: Show function signature when user types ( or ,

provider.name: ReferenceProvider
provider.desc: Find all references to a symbol

provider.name: DocumentSymbolProvider
provider.desc: Outline view — list all symbols in file

provider.name: CodeLensProvider
provider.desc: Inline actionable annotations above code lines

provider.name: InlayHintsProvider
provider.desc: Inline type hints shown in editor

provider.name: LinkedEditingRangeProvider
provider.desc: Linked editing e.g. HTML tag pairs
